post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 168: Oceanhorn
Credits to Binomial-theorem/chaotic_iak/willwang123 (among others) for the rule template.

Story
I'm leaving tonight and I'm not coming back, kid.
My fate is tied to a monster from the depths of time...
...Oceanhorn.
I hear its horrible sound echoing from the sea... it is coming for me again.
This is all happening sooner than I thought, and I'm forced to act.
Whatever happens next, I'm not going to lose you like I lost your mother.
This necklace is the last thing left of her.
Keep it close and guard it well.
I will give you my old notebook from my travels.
It will guide your way to an island of a friend.
He will help you to prepare for what is coming.
I know I'm asking too much of you, but this is the only way...
...to stop Oceanhorn.

You awake from your nightmare covered in sweat. The same dream about your father has kept you awake for the past few nights. You get up and walk out of your tent. The sun is just coming up, and you feel ready to begin the day. But on the horizon, mysterious boats begin to appear...


Rules
  • Read the rules. Including this one.
  • Follow all the rules. Including this one.
  • Do not post at night.
  • You may PM me at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification. Questions asked in-thread will only be answered in-PM, if at all, unless I specifically believe it is something worth telling the general public.
  • Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the moderators, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
  • You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others.
  • Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
  • Do not pretend to edit or otherwise pretend to break a rule.
  • If you are dead, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
  • Do not edit the tags on the thread. This also applies if you are not playing the game.
  • There is no confirm rule in this game. That does not excuse you from knowing the rules.


Voting/Hanging
  • This game is based on deadline hanging. The player with the most votes at the time the deadline is reached is hanged. Ties will be explained in the next section. Starting Day 2, majority hanging is enabled, which means day will end early if at any time a player has more than half the amount of total votes on them. If majority hang is not reached, deadline hanging occurs.
  • If there is a tie vote at the end of the day between two players, the result of it will be randomized. However, if there are an equal number of votes for No Hang and a player, No Hang will be the result.
  • Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>". For example, "Vote: fdas" is an acceptable vote, while "Vote: fdas", "Vote fdas", "vote: fdas", "Vote:fdas", "Vote: fads", "Vote: Fdas" and "Vote: fdas" are not.
  • Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly. Do not use nicknames.
  • Improperly made votes (including votes in hide tags or any of the unacceptable forms above) will not be counted under any circumstances. I will not tell you if your vote is invalid. There is one exception to this - see below.
  • The characters "I" (capital i) and "l" (lowercase L) are considered the same character for the purpose of voting. That is, attempting to fakevote by substituting one of these characters in will not work. Most other fakevotes are acceptable, but please PM me to confirm that it is. If we do not notice that you fakevoted, it may be counted as a real vote, so it is a good idea to PM me every time you intend to fakevote.
  • You may vote for no hanging to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Hang" or "Vote: No Hanging". (Note: This is not the same thing as unvoting.)
  • You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though it is appreciated if you do so. Unvote in the format "Unvote". An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
  • Starting Day 2, if at any point in a day more than half of the players currently alive are voting for a single player, that player will be hanged. It will then immediately be twilight.
  • Starting Day 2, if at any point in a day at least half of the players alive are voting to not hang, then nobody will be hanged. It will then be twilight.
  • The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
  • During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
  • Once I post a end-of-day scene, the person hanged (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.


Activity
  • Each day will be 264 hours (11 days). The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at his/her discretion. Note that this will be unlikely.
  • The deadline will occur the very second 264 hours has occurred.
  • Each night will be 3 real-life days long.
  • When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or his/her partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
  • Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night and start of the next day.
  • Activity rule for this game: While not on V/LA, you are expected to make at least one post between every two activity checks, which will be done roughly every 48 hours. If you miss this, you may be replaced without warning. Do not try to abuse this by saying "activity post" every two days - I will warn or replace you if I feel you are posting purely to bypass this requirement.
  • If a player is going to be V/LA, he/she must post in bold in-thread or PM me. The moderator will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long. If your V/LA will be longer than about a week, please either try to find a way to participate in the game during that time or ask for a replacement.


Etiquette
  • Do not use inappropriate language.
  • Do not make any personal attacks.
  • Be mature.
  • For a minor rule infraction, newbies can receive up to two warnings, and SE’s/IC's up to one. If a player commits an infraction after he/she has run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, he/she will be modkilled or force-replaced, depending on the scenario. Please do not make me modkill you.


Moderators
  • I (summitwei) am the Moderator of Game 168. math_turtle37 is the co-moderator of Game 168.
  • Red-colored text (#FF0000) is used for official votecounts and activity checks by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related posts.
  • Blue-colored text (#0000FF) is used for the moderator and co-mod's posts other than votecounts and activity checks.
  • Green-colored text (#00FF00) is used for town flavor-related posts.
  • Please do not do things that have the effect of impersonating a moderator. For the most part, though, posting in colors is fine.
  • The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules.


Setup
The setup for this game is D6. This is a semi-open, 13-player setup.

Mafia have daychat.
Mafia kills are mandatory and assigned. If a kill is not assigned, a random player that is not Mafia will be chosen as the nightkill, and a random Mafioso will be chosen as the killer. Mafia kills can be tracked, watched, or roleblocked.
The Mafia wincon is parity; that is, Mafia wins when there are as much Mafia as there are town.

Description of Randomization of Setup
The setup has 10 town and 3 mafia. First the Town Power Roles are generated, and then the Mafia Power Roles.

Roll a fair, 6-sided die 6 times and mark down the numbers obtained. The value of the roll corresponds to the type of role used, with more rolls correlating to more power of that type of role.

1-3 rolled = Investigative
4-5 rolled = Preventative
6 rolled = Killing

Investigative
1 I = Innocent Child
2 I = Role Oracle
3 I = Role Cop
4 I = Tracker
5 I = Parity Cop
6 I = Alignment Cop (w/ N0 peek)

Preventative
1 P = Bodyguard
2 P = Doctor
3 P = Roleblocker
4 P = Jailkeeper
5 P = Jailkeeper + Bodyguard
6 P = Roleblocker + Doctor

Killing
1 K = 1-Shot Vigilante
2 K = 2-Shot Vigilante
3 K = Vigilante
4 K = Vigilante
5 K = Vigilante + 1-Shot Vigilante
6 K = Vigilante + 2-Shot Vigilante


To create the Mafia Power Roles, take the number of Town Power Roles and subtract one. Roll a fair 6-sided die that many times. Mafia get one role of whichever side it lands on:
1 = Roleblocker
2 = Roleblocker
3 = Jailkeeper
4 = Role Cop
5 = Tracker
6 = Watcher

(For all roles that may be unfamiliar, read the Role PM.)


Role PM's
Vanilla Townie wrote:
Hello (player),


You are a Vanilla Townie.


Wincondition: You win when all threats to the Town have been eliminated.

Abilities:
You have no special abilities. Your power lies in your voice and your vote.


Good luck!
Innocent Child wrote:
Hello (player),


You are an Innocent Child.


Wincondition: You win when all threats to the Town have been eliminated.

Abilities:
Innocence: At any point during the game, you may PM me that you would like to be confirmed as town. I will then confirm you as Innocent Child.


Good luck!
Town Role Oracle wrote:
Hello (player),


You are a Town Role Oracle.


Wincondition: You win when all threats to the Town have been eliminated.

Abilities:
A Message From Beyond: Every night, you may PM me the name of a player. At any point when you die, the most recent player that has been chosen will have their role revealed. Alignments will not be distinguished; for example, Vanilla Townie and Mafia Goon will both show up as Vanilla.


Good luck!
Town Role Cop wrote:
Hello (player),


You are a Town Role Cop.


Wincondition: You win when all threats to the Town have been eliminated.

Abilities:
Role Cop: Every night, you may PM me the name of a player. I will then reply with the Role of the player. Alignments will not be distinguished; for example, Vanilla Townie and Mafia Goon will both show up as Vanilla.


Good luck!
Town Tracker wrote:
Hello (player),


You are a Town Tracker.


Wincondition: You win when all threats to the Town have been eliminated.

Abilities:
Track: Every night, you may PM me the name of a player. I will then reply to you the name of the player that this player targeted for their Night Action, if it exists. If there is no such player, I will reply "Did not target anybody". If the player targeted multiple players, I will randomly select one of them and reply with that one.


Good luck!
Town Parity Cop wrote:
Hello (player),


You are a Town Parity Cop.


Wincondition: You win when all threats to the Town have been eliminated.

Abilities:
Starting Parity Cop: You must use this action only once during the night, and before you use the action Parity Cop. PM me the name of a player. This will select your very first target for using the action Parity Cop on. You may not use both actions in the same night.
Parity Cop: Every night, after you have used the action Starting Parity Cop, you may PM me the name of a player. I will then reply to you whether or not this player, and the one you targeted last night, possess the same alignment.


Good luck!
Town Alignment Cop wrote:
Hello (player),


You are a Town Alignment Cop.


Wincondition: You win when all threats to the Town have been eliminated.

Abilities:
Alignment Cop: Every night, you may PM me the name of a player. I will then tell you whether that player is Town or Mafia.
Starting Check: You know that (player) is Town.


Good luck!
Town Bodyguard wrote:
Hello (player),


You are a Town Bodyguard.


Wincondition: You win when all threats to the Town have been eliminated.

Abilities:
Bodyguard: Every night, you may PM me the name of a player. If that player would have died from a nightkill, you will die instead. You will only protect from one nightkill, so if a player is targeted for killing by two different players, you and the player you bodyguarded will both die.


Good luck!
Town Doctor wrote:
Hello (player),


You are a Town Doctor.


Wincondition: You win when all threats to the Town have been eliminated.

Abilities:
Protection: Every night, you may PM me the name of a player. That player will be protected from one nightkill. (So, if they are targeted for killing by two different players, they will die.) You may not target yourself with this ability, and you may not target the same player two nights in a row.


Good luck!
Town Roleblocker wrote:
Hello (player),


You are a Town Roleblocker.


Wincondition: You win when all threats to the Town have been eliminated.

Abilities:
Roleblock: Every night, you may PM me the name of a player. No actions done by that player will take effect.


Good luck!
Town Jailkeeper wrote:
Hello (player),


You are a Town Jailkeeper.


Wincondition: You win when all threats to the Town have been eliminated.

Abilities:
Jailkeep: Every night, you may PM me the name of a player. That player will be both Roleblocked and Protected from one night kill. That is, any action they do that night will fail, and one kill on them will fail. (See Role PM's for Doctor and Roleblocker for more info.) You may not target yourself.


Good luck!
Town 1-Shot Vigilante wrote:
Hello (player),


You are a Town 1-Shot Vigilante.


Wincondition: You win when all threats to the Town have been eliminated.

Abilities:
Vigilante: Once during the night in the game, you may PM me the name of a player. You will target that player for a nightkill.


Good luck!
Town 2-Shot Vigilante wrote:
Hello (player),


You are a Town 2-Shot Vigilante.


Wincondition: You win when all threats to the Town have been eliminated.

Abilities:
Vigilante: Twice during the night in the game, you may PM me the name of a player. You will target that player for a nightkill.


Good luck!
Town Vigilante wrote:
Hello (player),


You are a Town Vigilante.


Wincondition: You win when all threats to the Town have been eliminated.

Abilities:
Vigilante: Every night, you may PM me the name of a player. You will target that player for a nightkill.


Good luck!

Mafia Goon wrote:
Hello (player),


You are a Mafia Goon.


Wincondition: You win when there are as many Mafia as there are Town.

Abilities:
Mafia: At any point during the game, you may discuss with your fellow Mafia [here].
Nightkill: Every night, somebody in the Mafia faction may choose someone to be targeted for a nightkill.

The Mafia team consists of:
(list of Mafia players and roles)

Good luck!
Mafia Roleblocker wrote:
Hello (player),


You are a Mafia Roleblocker.


Wincondition: You win when there are as many Mafia as there are Town.

Abilities:
Mafia: At any point during the game, you may discuss with your fellow Mafia [here].
Nightkill: Every night, somebody in the Mafia faction may choose someone to be targeted for a nightkill.
Roleblock: Every night, you may PM me the name of a player. No actions done by that player will take effect.

The Mafia team consists of:
(list of Mafia players and roles)

Good luck!
Mafia Jailkeeper wrote:
Hello (player),


You are a Mafia Jailkeeper.


Wincondition: You win when there are as many Mafia as there are Town.

Abilities:
Mafia: At any point during the game, you may discuss with your fellow Mafia [here].
Nightkill: Every night, somebody in the Mafia faction may choose someone to be targeted for a nightkill.
Jailkeep: Every night, you may PM me the name of a player. That player will be both Roleblocked and Protected from one night kill. That is, any action they do that night will fail, and one kill on them will fail. (See Role PM's for Doctor and Roleblocker for more info.)

The Mafia team consists of:
(list of Mafia players and roles)

Good luck!
Mafia Role Cop wrote:
Hello (player),


You are a Mafia Role Cop.


Wincondition: You win when there are as many Mafia as there are Town.

Abilities:
Mafia: At any point during the game, you may discuss with your fellow Mafia [here].
Nightkill: Every night, somebody in the Mafia faction may choose someone to be targeted for a nightkill.
Role Cop: Every night, you may PM me the name of a player. I will then reply with the Role of the player. Alignments will not be distinguished; for example, Vanilla Townie and Mafia Goon will both show up as Vanilla.

Wincondition: You win when there are as many Mafia as there are Town.

Abilities:

If there is no such player, I will reply "Did not target anybody". If the player targeted multiple players, I will randomly select one of them and reply with that one.

[b]Parity Cop:[/b] Every night, after you have used the action [b]Starting Parity Cop[/b], you may PM me the name of a player. I will then reply to you whether or not this player, and the one you targeted last night, possess the same alignment.


Good luck![/quote]

Game Comments
